description: Fragment of a geographical study discussing some of the parts of Africa concerning Angola and Mozambique – undated – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 105) – in French. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa. ed. Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 28). MCD.
